subject: An armored warrior and their dog holding off a wave of translucent blue ghost-creatures in a canyon
description: A humanoid figure in silver-and-green plate armor crouches in a defensive mid-canyon setting, pressing forward against a surge of translucent blue ghostly creatures. A dog — visibly a medium-large breed with lighter coloring — stands beside the warrior with ears raised alertly. The warrior holds a blade and appears to be mid-engagement with the ghostly forms, which are semi-transparent and glow with an icy blue light. The canyon walls are sandy brown and the sky above is overcast. The flavor text references the warrior Terrin and his dog, but this description is grounded in the visible art alone.
foreground: armored warrior with blade crouching beside a dog, engaging ghostly blue creatures
